arts.ttl: Analysis: Leeds centre-back Struijk is best in Ch’ship
arts.sum: Leeds United centre-back Pascal Struijk is having to prove his qualities as a leader as well as one of the best in the division, in the wake of Ethan Ampadu’s long-term injury. However, in ripping up Sheffield United’s unbeaten run and clean sheet streak, while chalking up another clean sheet of his own, Struijk proved he’s the best in the Championship at centre-back.

arts.ttl: Leeds United-mad Luke Humphries beats Luke Littler before winning Czech Darts Open title
arts.sum: The 29-year-old had previously beaten Ritchie Edhouse on Saturday, and then Gian van Veen and Mike De Decker, to whom he had lost in last week’s World Grand Prix final. That followed a compelling 7-4 semi-final win against teen sensation Littler, whose run to that point had included posting averages of 110.43, a new tournament record, when beating Nathan Aspinall 6-1 on Saturday, then 116.51 to break the record in a 6-3 victory over Damon Heta, and 110.57 in a stunning 6-1 triumph against Michael van Gerwen.

arts.ttl: Foreign media ‘feel sorry’ for Leeds United man after grim showing against league holders
arts.sum: Leeds United are going to be hoping that Eintracht Frankfurt remain high on Rasmus Kristensen as they look to secure a permanent agreement, but his showing against Bayer Leverkusen wasn’t ideal. A trip to Bayer Leverkusen came next for Eintracht after a very strong start to this season, and a huge test for Kristensen on the right side of the pitch, facing a fearsome left-side trio of Alejandro Grimaldo, Yacine Adli and Martin Terrier.

arts.ttl: Tom Cleverley given huge Watford injury boost ahead of Leeds United clash
arts.sum: The Hornets, who were beaten 3-0 by their arch rivals, head to Leeds United on Tuesday night with a point to prove after a disappointing display at Kenilworth Road. Cleverley was able to call on Edo Kayembe who was a doubt heading into the game, while both Dan Bachmann and Giorgi Chakvetadze recovered from minor injuries to play.

arts.ttl: ‘I worry for them’ – Leeds United vs Watford prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Leeds United vs Watford prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Tuesday. The post ‘I worry for them’ – Leeds United vs Watford prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

Second-half goals from Pascal Struijk and Mateo Joseph gave Leeds the result that they deserved on Friday night as they ended Sheffield United's unbeaten start to the campaign with a dominant home win...

arts.ttl: Leeds United’s next opponents Watford dubbed “feeble” after Luton embarrassment
arts.sum: The last thing that Watford will have wanted after a humbling in their biggest game of the season is travelling up to face one of the title favourites away from home in midweek. Leeds United’s attention turns swiftly to another Elland Road clash this midweek, facing Tom Cleverley’s Watford following their derby defeat to Luton Town.

arts.ttl: Leeds United did something no Championship side has ever done vs Sheffield United, proving their title credentials: Opinion
arts.sum: Leeds United returned from the recent international break all guns blazing and put on a superb display in… The post Leeds United did something no Championship side has ever done vs Sheffield United, proving their title credentials: Opinion appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Pascal Struijk lifts the lid on Sheffield United game plan and set piece hope
arts.sum: The Whites' defender scored the opening goal of the game with a brilliant first time finish at the near post, blasting the ball into the roof of the net. He said: "The confidence with us in the group is already high, like I feel like [after] an unfortunate goal before international break, it shouldn't really change what we've done in the game there.

arts.ttl: Unseen contribution of Leeds United new-look midfield that Daniel Farke loved
arts.sum: They also send the message in which way we want to attack the game. Daniel Farke was delighted with his new-look central midfield partnership as they overcame the challenge of Yorkshire rivals Sheffield United on Friday night.
